items.title: SF Bay Area
items.subtitle: Region
items.summary: The **San Francisco Bay Area**, commonly known as the **Bay Area**, is a [region of California](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_regions_of_California) surrounding and including [San Francisco Bay](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Francisco_Bay), and anchored by the cities of [Oakland](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Oakland), [San Francisco](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Francisco), and [San Jose](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Jose,_California).[[8]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Francisco_Bay_Area#cite_note-8) The [Association of Bay Area Governments](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Association_of_Bay_Area_Governments) defines the Bay Area as including the nine counties that border the [estuaries](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Estuary) of San Francisco Bay, [San Pablo Bay](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Pablo_Bay), and [Suisun Bay](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suisun_Bay): [Alameda](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alameda_County,_California), [Contra Costa](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Contra_Costa_County,_California), [Marin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marin_County,_California), [Napa](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Napa_County,_California), [San Mateo](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Mateo_County,_California), [Santa Clara](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Santa_Clara_County,_California), [Solano](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Solano_County,_California), [Sonoma](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sonoma_County,_California), and [San Francisco](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Francisco). Other definitions may be either smaller or larger, and may include neighboring counties which are not officially part of the San Francisco Bay Area, such as the [Central Coast](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Central_Coast_(California)) counties of [Santa Cruz](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Santa_Cruz_County,_California), [San Benito](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Benito_County,_California), and [Monterey](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Monterey_County,_California), or the [Central Valley](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Central_Valley_(California)) counties of [San Joaquin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Joaquin_County,_California), [Merced](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Merced_County,_California), and [Stanislaus](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stanislaus_County,_California).[[9]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/San_Francisco_Bay_Area#cite_note-OMB-23-01-9) The Bay Area is known for its natural beauty, prominent universities, technology companies, and affluence. The Bay Area contains many cities, towns, airports, and associated regional, state, and national parks, connected by a complex [multimodal transportation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Multimodal_transport) network.
